docs.title: NDC Security 2026 – Oslo
docs.text: Dato: 4–5 mars 2026 Sted: Radisson Blu Scandinavia Hotel, Oslo, Norway Livestream: YouTube Live

docs.title: Onsdag 4. mars 2026 – Livestream
docs.text: Rom YouTube Live Room 1 https://www.youtube.com/live/fbPQ9fIlZ0E Room 2 https://www.youtube.com/live/4HACQtUZ0z8 Room 3 https://www.youtube.com/live/QpDgIgFv_NM Room 4 https://www.youtube.com/live/kKLc27v9B3s Room 5 https://www.youtube.com/live/UDSGwIa7hS8

docs.title: 09:00 – 10:00
docs.text: • Room 2: Keynote: 25 Years of the Microsoft SDL – Michael Howard

docs.title: 10:20 – 11:20
docs.text:
• Room 1: Prompt Injection Attacks in LLM-Powered Applications – Magno Logan
  • Room 2: Getting Authorization Right in .NET – Michele Leroux Bustamante
  • Room 3: Securing Model Context Protocol (MCP) – Jim Manico
  • Room 4: MCP Security: Keep Your AI Agents from Spilling the Tea – Awar Abdulkarim & Manfred Bjørlin
  • Room 5: Part 1/2: Hack your own pipeline – Jan-Kåre Solbakken & Emil Albrektsson

docs.title: 11:40 – 12:40
docs.text:
• Room 1: An AppSec Tale: From Zero to 250+ Champions – Even Tillerli & Nicole Silva
  • Room 2: ASP.NET Core meets OWASP Top 10 2025 – Anders Abel
  • Room 3: Your Website Is Running Code You've Never Seen – Scott Helme
  • Room 4: Zero-Knowledge Proofs – Tjerand Silde
  • Room 5: Part 2/2: Hack your own pipeline – Jan-Kåre Solbakken & Emil Albrektsson

docs.title: 13:40 – 14:40
docs.text:
• Room 1: Web Tracking Technologies – Yana Dimova
  • Room 2: Beyond Trust… – Niels Tanis
  • Room 3: How to Know Your Client Is Real – Victor Lyuboslavsky
  • Room 4: The evolution of fighting crime… – Ruben van Well

docs.title: 15:00 – 16:00
docs.text:
• Room 1: Demystifying CSP – Philippe De Ryck
  • Room 2: Won't somebody… children!? – Niall Merrigan
  • Room 3: Have I Been Pwned – A Passkey Journey – Stefán Jökull Sigurðarson
  • Room 4: Securing Code in the Age of AI – Simona Toader
  • Room 5: Lightning Talks

docs.title: 16:20 – 17:20
docs.text:
• Room 1: Seeing Isn't Believing: Deepfakes… – Tudor Damian
  • Room 2: Safe by design… – Dora Makszy
  • Room 3: sshlogin… – Ignat Korchagin
  • Room 4: Prompt Hardening – Sean Sinclair
  • Room 5: Lightning Talks – Mackenzie Jackson

docs.title: 17:40 – 18:40
docs.text:
• Room 1: MITRE ATT&CK for Developers – Chris Ayers
  • Room 2: What we can learn from the World's Biggest Heists – James Birnie
  • Room 3: Beyond the Commit… – Niek Palm
  • Room 4: AI Agents and Jupyter Notebooks… – Roberto Rodriguez
  • Room 5: Has your flight been cancelled? – Konstantinos Fouzas

docs.title: Torsdag 5. mars 2026 – Livestream
docs.text: Rom YouTube Live Room 1 https://www.youtube.com/live/75moHxqyvFQ Room 2 https://www.youtube.com/live/97awOX0TaLs Room 3 https://www.youtube.com/live/osMrLt8ibbA Room 4 https://www.youtube.com/live/7qG-1VcVtBk Room 5 (Mangler ennå)

docs.title: 09:00 – 10:00
docs.text:
• Room 1: Three decades of curl – Daniel Stenberg
  • Room 2: The server that talked back: SSRFs – Sofia Lindqvist
  • Room 3: app.alert(1) is the new alert(1) – Luigi Gubello
  • Room 4: OWASP Automated Security Testing… – Sam Stepanyan
  • Room 5: Part 1/2: Securing your AI code generation workflow – Armin Buescher & Erlend Oftedal

docs.title: 10:20 – 11:20
docs.text:
• Room 1: Post-quantum cryptography for .NET developers – Filip W.
  • Room 2: Is Your Approach to Pipeline Security Flawed? – Patricia R
  • Room 3: Protocol-Hopping C2 – Francine Solheim
  • Room 4: OWASP Breaking the Black Box… – Jason Ross
  • Room 5: Part 2/2: Securing your AI code generation workflow – Armin Buescher & Erlend Oftedal

docs.title: 11:40 – 12:40
docs.text:
• Room 1: The Risky Business, of AI Illiteracy – Sean Juroviesky
  • Room 2: Hijacking Google's CI/CD Through Prompt Injection – Mackenzie Jackson
  • Room 3: From WAN to NAS: A Pwn2Own Journey – Daan Keuper
  • Room 4: OWASP Juice Shop: Take your security vitamins! – Jannik Hollenbach & Björn Kimminich
  • Room 5: Part 1/2: Introduction to the new post-quantum standards – Tjerand Silde

docs.title: 13:40 – 14:40
docs.text:
• Room 1: Connecting the dots… – Sindre Breda & Manfred Cheung
  • Room 2: Worms in our software supply chain – Charlie Eriksen
  • Room 3: Attacking AI – Jason Haddix
  • Room 4: AppSec Security: The SDLC in the age of agentic – Jon Mccoy
  • Room 5: Part 2/2: Introduction to the new post-quantum standards – Tjerand Silde

docs.title: 15:00 – 16:00
docs.text:
• Room 1: Learning security monitoring through failure – Truls Dahlsveen
  • Room 2: Anti-Patterns: How to Not implement a Cloud Security tool – Johan Paramanathan
  • Room 3: Secure and Compliant APIs – By Design – Daniel Sandberg & Tobias Ahnoff
  • Room 4: It is rough without a WAF – José Carlos Chávez
  • Room 5: Part 1/2: Games as tools for scaling your application security program – Johan Sydseter

docs.title: 16:20 – 17:20
docs.text:
• Room 1: Supercharging Incident Response – Giorgio Perticone
  • Room 2: What's New in ASVS V5 – Eden Yardeni
  • Room 3: BOLA, BOPLA, and BFLA… – Eivind Jahr Kirkeby
  • Room 4: Who Gave the Agent Admin Rights?! – Bodhisattva Das
  • Room 5: Part 2/2: Games as tools for scaling… – Johan Sydseter

docs.title: Kilde
